summary: Fix macOS Calendar permission so Nucleus appears in System Settings and can read your schedule.

fixed: Calendar access on macOS — add Hardened Runtime Calendars entitlement so the system permission prompt appears and Nucleus shows in Settings → Privacy & Security → Calendars
Calendar access setup copy clarifies you must click Allow Calendar Access before opening System Settings
updated: CloudKit development schema and deploy scripts include CD_CalendarEventRecord for calendar iCloud sync
